eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Wilson, TX; at 08:04 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 08:04 AM APR 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: TEST - TEST - TEST: This is a TEST of the Wilson County Emergency Notification System. We are conducting a scheduled, mandatory test to ensure system readiness. No action is required at this time. If this had been an actual emergency, you would have heard official information, news, or instructions.  This notification serves the Wilson County area.  This concludes this test of the Wilson County Emergency Notification System. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.
